text:
This chapter shall be liberally construed to lessen and prevent:

(1) the theft of motor vehicles;

(2) the importation into this state of and traffic in motor vehicles that are stolen; and

(3) the sale of an encumbered motor vehicle without the enforced disclosure to the purchaser of a lien secured by the vehicle.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.003 — Purpose

This chapter shall be liberally construed to lessen and prevent:

    (1) the theft of motor vehicles;

    (2) the importation into this state of and traffic in motor vehicles that are stolen; and

    (3) the sale of an encumbered motor vehicle without the enforced disclosure to the purchaser of a lien secured by the vehicle.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 2, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.text: This chapter shall be liberally construed to lessen and prevent:
the importation into this state of and traffic in motor vehicles that are stolen; and
the sale of an encumbered motor vehicle without the enforced disclosure to the purchaser of a lien secured by the vehicle.
